package.name: obstacle_avoidance
package.description: Layer 2 stretch goal: reads LIDAR scan data (published on /scan by whichever driver is running -- see ydlidar_ros2_driver in this workspace), detects obstacles within a configurable stop threshold in the robot's forward path, and sends a stop/go serial command to the Arduino Mega running main_robot.ino. See CLAUDE.md and the project plan for the full priority-layer context.
